Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PendingDamage
DerivedAttributeInfo: Meta: Accumulates incoming damage before it is applied.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PendingMitigationCost
DerivedAttributeInfo: Meta: Accumulates mitigation stamina cost before it is subtracted.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PendingHeal
DerivedAttributeInfo: Meta: Accumulates incoming healing before it is applied.

_section: ── Derived Totals (computed — do not modify directly) ──

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxHealthTotal
DerivedAttributeInfo: Derived: MaxHealthTotal = (MaxHealth + MaxHealthAdd) * (1 + MaxHealthPercent). Do not modify directly.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxStaminaTotal
DerivedAttributeInfo: Derived: MaxStaminaTotal = (MaxStamina + MaxStaminaAdd) * (1 + MaxStaminaPercent). Do not modify directly.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxMagicTotal
DerivedAttributeInfo: Derived: MaxMagicTotal = (MaxMagic + MaxMagicAdd) * (1 + MaxMagicPercent). Do not modify directly.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Health
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Current health. Usually clamped to [0, MaxHealthTotal].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxHealth
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Base max health (before add/percent).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxHealthAdd
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Flat bonus to max health (gear/buffs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxHealthPercent
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Percent multiplier to max health in [0,1] range (0.10 = +10%).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.HealthRegenRate
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Health per second regen (out of combat or always-on depending on rules).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Stamina
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Current stamina. Usually clamped to [0, MaxStaminaTotal].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxStamina
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Base max stamina (before add/percent).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxStaminaAdd
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Flat bonus to max stamina (gear/buffs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxStaminaPercent
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Percent multiplier to max stamina in [0,1] range (0.10 = +10%).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.StaminaCost
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Base stamina cost used by certain abilities (if referenced by your costs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.StaminaRegenRate
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Stamina per second regen (after delay).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.StaminaRegenDelay
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Seconds after spending stamina before regen starts.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Magic
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Current magic. Usually clamped to [0, MaxMagicTotal].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxMagic
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Base max magic (before add/percent).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxMagicAdd
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Flat bonus to max magic (gear/buffs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxMagicPercent
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Percent multiplier to max magic in [0,1] range (0.10 = +10%).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MagicCost
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Base magic cost used by certain abilities (if referenced by your costs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MagicRegenRate
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Magic per second regen (after delay).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MagicRegenDelay
DerivedAttributeInfo: Vitals: Seconds after spending magic before regen starts.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BaseDamage
DerivedAttributeInfo: Damage: Baseline damage before bonuses, used by your damage execution/GE.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BaseDamageBonus
DerivedAttributeInfo: Damage: Flat additive bonus to BaseDamage (gear/buffs).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BaseDamageReduction
DerivedAttributeInfo: Defense: Flat reduction to incoming damage (after/with other mitigation depending on rules).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.CriticalHitChance
DerivedAttributeInfo: Damage: Crit chance in [0,1]. 0.05 = 5%.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.CriticalHitMultiplier
DerivedAttributeInfo: Damage: Crit multiplier applied on crit (1.5 = 150%).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.AttackSpeed
DerivedAttributeInfo: Offense: Base attack speed multiplier (1.0 = normal). Scales montage play rate.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.AttackSpeedMultiplier
DerivedAttributeInfo: Offense: Additive multiplier to AttackSpeed from buffs/debuffs.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.LifeSteal
DerivedAttributeInfo: Offense: Percent of damage dealt returned as healing in [0,1].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockChance
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Chance to block in [0,1].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockMitigation
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Percent damage mitigated while blocking in [0,1].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockAngle
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Effective block cone angle (degrees).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockLimit
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Flat cap on mitigated damage (0 = no cap).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockStaminaCostRate
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Stamina cost per point of damage mitigated.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.BlockCooldown
DerivedAttributeInfo: Block: Cooldown/penalty window after guard break (seconds).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.EvadeStaminaCost
DerivedAttributeInfo: Evade: Stamina cost to evade/dodge.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.EvadeCooldown
DerivedAttributeInfo: Evade: Cooldown between evades (seconds).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.DefenseChance
DerivedAttributeInfo: Defense: Passive defend chance in [0,1] (separate from block).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.DefenseMitigation
DerivedAttributeInfo: Defense: Passive mitigation in [0,1].

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.DefenseStaminaCostRate
DerivedAttributeInfo: Defense: Stamina cost per point mitigated for passive defense.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.ArmorReduction
DerivedAttributeInfo: Armor: Flat reduction applied to incoming damage.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.TenacityPercent
DerivedAttributeInfo: Defense: CC duration reduction in [0,0.75]. 0.25 = 25% shorter CC. Capped to prevent full immunity.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.LastStandCount
DerivedAttributeInfo: Last Stand: Number of fatal hits you can negate.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.LastStandHealthPercent
DerivedAttributeInfo: Last Stand: Health percent granted after fatal hit is negated (0.25 = 25%).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Poise
DerivedAttributeInfo: Poise: Current poise. At 0, stagger triggers.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MaxPoise
DerivedAttributeInfo: Poise: Maximum poise.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PoiseDamage
DerivedAttributeInfo: Poise: Incoming poise damage accumulator (if used by your logic).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PoiseRecovery
DerivedAttributeInfo: Poise: Recovery rate (points per interval).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.PoiseRecoveryInterval
DerivedAttributeInfo: Poise: Recovery interval in seconds.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.StaggerDuration
DerivedAttributeInfo: Stagger: Duration (seconds) applied when poise breaks.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.RiposteWindowDuration
DerivedAttributeInfo: Riposte: Time window after parry for riposte (seconds).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.RiposteDamageBonusMultiplier
DerivedAttributeInfo: Riposte: Damage multiplier during riposte window.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MoveSpeed
DerivedAttributeInfo: Movement: Base movement speed (UE default walk is 600). Modified by MoveSpeedMultiplier.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.MoveSpeedMultiplier
DerivedAttributeInfo: Movement: Multiplier to MoveSpeed from buffs/debuffs (1.0 = normal, 0.5 = 50% slow).

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.CooldownReduction
DerivedAttributeInfo: Cooldown: Percent reduction applied to ability cooldowns in [0,0.5]. 0.20 = 20% faster cooldowns.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Level
DerivedAttributeInfo: Progression: Character level. Often used in scaling formulas for damage/defense.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.Experience
DerivedAttributeInfo: Progression: Current experience points toward next level.

Name: NinjaCombatAttributeSet.ExperienceBonus
DerivedAttributeInfo: Progression: Percent bonus XP in [0,1] (0.10 = +10% XP). Applied on XP gain.
